title: Mimi in Jawoyn Mimi spirit people context
publication_or_organisation: No Accounting; ABC Four Corners / Matthew Carney
australian_relation: ABC Four Corners public transcript from the Northern Territory naming Mimi spirit people in a rock-art-place discussion.
evidence_summary: In ABC Four Corners' No Accounting transcript, Margaret Katherine identifies a Mimi image and describes Mimi as spirit people who live deep inside the cave and look after the land and the painting.
